# Requirement Review Checklist (ISO 26262-8:2018 §6 aligned)
# Generated by pharaoh-tailor-bootstrap

## Mandatory checks

- [ ] ID follows project convention (`^[A-Z]+_[A-Z0-9_]+$`)
- [ ] Title is concise (≤ 80 characters)
- [ ] Body uses shall-clause form with component subject
- [ ] No internal implementation details (function names, file paths, line numbers)
- [ ] ASIL rating assigned
- [ ] Status set to `draft`
- [ ] `:satisfies:` link to parent feature or system requirement
- [ ] Verifiable by stated verification method

## Optional checks

- [ ] No ambiguous language (avoid, minimize, etc.)
- [ ] Single testable behavior per requirement
- [ ] Source file traceable via `:source_doc:`
